title: Mini 1.21 Loot Farms
description:
Extension pack for Mini Factories!

Containing:
1 Mini Wind Charge Farm and 2 different Mini Vault Loot Farms to get a bigger reward after finishing a vault run!
body:
# Mini 1.21 Loot Farms

Welcome to the Mini 1.21 Loot Farms!

This data pack provides **three** Mini Farms which generate loot over time.
One generates normal vault loot and the other generates ominous vault loot with a chance of giving you the Heavy Core. The third one is a Mini Wind Charge Farm.

How to build (Mini Vault Farms):
- Place a dropper under a vault facing up.
- Put an item frame on one of its sides.
- Depending on what loot you want you either put in the item frame:
  - a Trail Key
  - or an Ominous Trail Key

How to build (Mini Wind Charge Farms):
- Place a dropper under an oxidized copper grate facing up.
- Put an item frame on one of its sides.
- Put a Wind Charge in the item frame

Enjoy the **VAULTS**!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Resin Farm</summary>

Put a resin clump in the item frame and a creaking heart on top of the dropper!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Pale Moss Farm</summary>

Put a Pale moss Block in the item frame and place a pale moss carpet on top of the dropper.

</details>
